title: uva-ursi procumbens var. coactilis
intro: Uva-ursi procumbens var. coactilis, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and inflammation. The health benefits of uva-ursi procumbens var. coactilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote a healthy gut. Herbal preparations of uva-ursi procumbens var. coactilis include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
